title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Narayana Health

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Narayana Health
jsonLd.description:
We at Narayana Health are looking for an experienced Medical Officer based out of Chandigarh. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Narayana Health:
Narayana Health is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Narayana Health!
